column1: # registry.tsv — index of installable Agent Skills. TAB-separated (real tabs).
# sprout does NOT bundle skill bodies; it downloads them on demand from these
# sources, pins them, and vendors a copy into the generated project + skills.lock.
#   cli:    optional — "<tool> (global|project)" when this skill documents a CLI
# Prefer git sources (pinned SHA in skills.lock, offline cache, no Node needed).
# Regenerated from registry.md. skillsh:* rows are fetched via `npx skills add` and
# pinned by content hash; they need Node/npx and run a bit slower than git sources.

column5: debugging a bug or unexpected behavior
exploring ideas or scoping a feature
writing a commit or opening a PR
writing prompts for an agent or model
writing or running browser / e2e tests
writing React in a Next.js/Vercel app
designing an HTTP endpoint or API
writing SQL or schema for PostgreSQL
generating a changelog or release notes
